articles.title: KCET UGCET 2026 provisional first-round seat allotment result declared at cetonline.karnataka.gov.in; candidates can raise objections by 5 PM
articles.summary: KEA seat allotment 2026: The Karnataka Examinations Authority has declared the UGCET 2026 first round provisional seat allotment result for admissions to professional courses, including Engineering. Candidates can check their allotment status on the official KEA website.

articles.title: RBI Grade B prelims scorecards 2026 released at rbi.org.in: Direct link to download here
articles.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has released the RBI Grade B Prelims Score Card 2026 and Phase 1 cut-off marks on its official website. Candidates can access their section-wise scores, overall marks and qualifying status using their login credentials.

articles.title: JK High Court Junior Assistant admit card 2025 released at jkhighcourt.nic.in; download hall ticket for July 19 exam here
articles.summary: The High Court of Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh has released the Junior Assistant admit card for the written examination scheduled on July 19, 2026. Candidates can download the hall ticket from the official website using their Registration Number and Date of Birth.

articles.title: RSCIT admit card 2026 released at vmou.ac.in for July and August exams; download hall ticket here
articles.summary: RSCIT admit card 2026: VMOU, Kota has released the RSCIT admit cards for candidates appearing in the July and August 2026 examination cycle. Candidates scheduled for the July 19 and August 2 exams can download their hall tickets from the official Permission Letter portal using their login credentials.
